series_metadata.series_description: This file contains documents generally associated with all boat registrations issued by the Division of Parks and Watercraft to document ownership and type of boat, including but not limited to: registration applications, documents supporting the registration applications, registration forms, registrations, transfer/renewal/duplicate requests, electronic renewals and registrations returned as undeliverable.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Departmental-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor, unless they are scanned and saved in an electronic format. these documents are scanned and saved in an electronic format, paper copy may be destroyed. ; Electronic: State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor
